BLite.Server

Preview
🖥️Overview📦Installation🔌Protocol & API🎨Web Studio📡Client SDKs🔗Version Matrix

📡 Client SDKs

Official clients for BLite.Server are available for .NET, TypeScript/JavaScript, and Java. All three speak the gRPC protocol and share the same feature surface.

Feature Matrix

Feature
🔷.NET
🟨TypeScript
☕Java
Insert / FindById / Update / Delete✓✓✓
Bulk insert & bulk operations✓✓✓
BLQL query builder✓✓✓
Strongly-typed collections✓––
Streaming query results✓✓✓
ACID transactions✓✓✓
Key-value store (IBLiteKvStore)✓✓✓
Admin: user management✓✓✓
Admin: database management✓✓✓
Source-generator BSON mappers✓––
Spring Boot auto-configuration––✓
ASP.NET Core DI integration✓––

🔷 .NET — BLite.Client

The official .NET client. Integrates with ASP.NET Core dependency injection and supports strongly-typed BSON serialization via C# source generators.

Install

dotnet add package BLite.Client

Quick Start

using BLite.Client;

// Register in DI (ASP.NET Core)
builder.Services.AddBLiteClient(o =>
{
    o.Host   = "localhost";
    o.Port   = 2626;
    o.ApiKey = "your-api-key";
});

// Inject BLiteClient and use it
var client     = sp.GetRequiredService<BLiteClient>();
var collection = client.GetCollection<Order>("orders");

// Insert
var id = await collection.InsertAsync(newOrder);

// Query
var results = await collection.AsQueryable()
    .Where(o => o.Status == "active")
    .OrderByDescending(o => o.CreatedAt)
    .Take(20)
    .ToListAsync();
NuGet ↗GitHub ↗

🟨 TypeScript — @blite/client

Built on @grpc/grpc-js. Works in Node.js and server-side environments. Supports both callback and async/await styles.

Install

npm install @blite/client

Quick Start

import { BLiteClient } from '@blite/client';

const client = new BLiteClient({
  host:   'localhost',
  port:   2626,
  apiKey: 'your-api-key',
});

// Insert a document
const id = await client.insert('orders', {
  status: 'active',
  total:  99.95,
});

// Query with a builder
const results = await client
  .query('orders')
  .where(q => q.eq('status', 'active'))
  .orderByDesc('createdAt')
  .take(20)
  .toArray();
npm ↗GitHub ↗

☕ Java — blite-client-java

Built on grpc-java. Available on Maven Central. Requires Java 21+ (uses sealed interface pattern matching for query builder).

Install

<!-- Maven -->
<dependency>
  <groupId>io.blite</groupId>
  <artifactId>blite-client-java</artifactId>
  <version>0.1.2</version>
</dependency>
// Gradle (Kotlin DSL)
implementation("io.blite:blite-client-java:0.1.2")

Quick Start

import io.blite.client.BLiteClient;
import io.blite.client.BLiteClientOptions;

var options = new BLiteClientOptions("localhost", 2626, "your-api-key");
try (var client = new BLiteClient(options)) {

    // Insert
    Map<String, Object> doc = Map.of("status", "active", "total", 99.95);
    String id = client.insert("orders", doc);

    // Query
    List<Map<String, Object>> results = client
        .query("orders")
        .where(q -> q.eq("status", "active"))
        .orderByDesc("createdAt")
        .take(20)
        .toList();
}

Spring Boot Integration

// application.yml
blite:
  host: localhost
  port: 2626
  api-key: ${BLITE_API_KEY}

// Auto-configured bean available via @Autowired
@Autowired
private BLiteClient client;
Maven Central ↗GitHub ↗

Admin & KV Clients

Each SDK also ships dedicated clients for user management and the key-value store:

Client.NETTypeScriptJava
AdminBLiteAdminClientBLiteAdminClientBLiteAdminClient
Key-Value StoreBLiteKvStoreBLiteKvStoreBLiteKvStore
